title: Runology
description: Create unique runes and learn runology
body:
- A mod that will bring a new branch of creation to minecraft! By studying runology, you will be able to create a large number of different runes that will help you survive. 
- Your first task will be to find runolin ore in the bowels of the earth. After processing the unusual material, you will be able to create runolin focusers and a synthesizer. Next, you will build a structure that will help you synthesiser empty runes first, and then full-fledged ones.
- ![Runolin synthesiser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b7751b828de29e48d89450bb9156c59a5a9febd.png)

If you speak Russian, then you can join my discord server, where you can find news on my projects, chat with me and my team, or just find friends. However, if you do not speak Russian, this does not mean that you are not allowed on my discord server. You can also join, I will be glad to see everyone. In addition, all important news is duplicated into English, so you do not need to translate the text.
